strengths: Failed IAM mutations no longer normalize as successful capability development
External sample pack now exposes one remaining semantic gap rather than broad normalization failure
weaknesses: TA0005.LOG_TAMPER remains conservative because it still requires initial_access before treating raw StopLogging/DeleteTrail as feasible
Okta public coverage is still narrow and under-represents real identity anomalies
Memory footprint on large external-mix assess runs is still high because the assess path materializes a large report and evidence structures
